sra_ids.title: SRA Sample IDs (e.g., SRR3589956,SRR3589957)
sra_ids.description: Comma-separated list of SRA accession IDs

transcriptome_fasta.title: Reference Transcriptome (FASTA)
transcriptome_fasta.description: Reference transcriptome to use for Salmon indexing and quantification

ncpu.title: Number of CPUs
ncpu.description: Number of CPUs to use for SRA download and for Salmon quantification

memory_gb.title: Memory (GB)
memory_gb.description: Memory allocation in GB for Salmon tasks

max_reads.title: Maximum Reads (Optional)
max_reads.description: Maximum number of reads to download (such as for testing or downsampling). Leave blank to download all reads.

workflow_failure_mode.title: Workflow Failure Mode
workflow_failure_mode.description: Behavior when individual tasks encounter failures
